_note: ROSTER STUB — picks are TODO until draft (ARCHITECTURE §5). Each manager drafts EXACTLY 4 picks from 4 distinct conferences (settled format, enforced by validate_team_names.py). Each pick is an over/under bet vs a preseason Vegas win total; 'line' is frozen at draft, never updated (§1). direction = "O" (over) | "U" (under). `manager` is the manager_id join key from config.json. Store canonical team names only (§9).
